code: import React from'react';import StatusBadge from'../StatusBadge/StatusBadge';import'./BookCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CATEGORY_COLORS=['#c9a84c','#2dd4bf','#818cf8','#f472b6','#34d399','#fb923c'];function getColor(category){let hash=0;for(let c of category||'')hash=c.charCodeAt(0)+hash*31;return CATEGORY_COLORS[Math.abs(hash)%CATEGORY_COLORS.length];}function getStatus(qty){if(qty===0)return'ISSUED';if(qty<0)return'DAMAGED';return'AVAILABLE';}function BookCard(_ref){let{book,onEdit,onDelete,onBorrow}=_ref;const color=getColor(book.book_category);const status=getStatus(book.book_quantity);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"book-card fade-in",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"book-card__spine",style:{background:color}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"book-card__content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"book-card__category",style:{color},children:book.book_category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"book-card__title",children:book.book_title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"book-card__author",children:["by ",book.book_author]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"book-card__footer",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(StatusBadge,{status:status}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"book-card__qty",children:["Qty: ",book.book_quantity]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"book-card__actions",children:[onBorrow&&status==='AVAILABLE'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn--primary btn--sm",onClick:()=>onBorrow(book),children:"Borrow"}),onEdit&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn--ghost btn--sm",onClick:()=>onEdit(book),children:"Edit"}),onDelete&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn--danger btn--sm",onClick:()=>onDelete(book.book_id),children:"Delete"})]})]})]});}export default BookCard;
